codeReview.summary: Pure refactoring: 11 enum property mapper functions (mapHyphens, mapPageBreak, mapBorderStyle, mapBoxAlign, mapTableVerticalAlign, mapTextDecoration, mapFontVariant, mapTextTransform, mapFontStyle, mapFontWeight, mapFontStretch) were moved from css_values.go (8 functions, 116 lines removed) and yj_to_epub_resources.go (3 functions, 54 lines removed) to yj_property_info.go (180 lines added). A section header comment was added. doc.go checklist was updated. All code is within the same package so no import changes needed. Build and vet pass. 430 synthetic tests pass with no modifications. No functional change whatsoever.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The feature description stated 'Move enum Prop entries from kfx.go to yj_property_info.go' but the actual enum mappers were in css_values.go and yj_to_epub_resources.go, not kfx.go. The worker correctly identified the actual source files by reading the codebase. The doc.go had a stale comment saying 'enum Prop entries still in kfx.go' which the worker updated. Feature descriptions for future tasks should be verified against actual code state.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Feature description says 'Move ~50 lines of enum Prop declarations from internal/kfx/kfx.go' but kfx.go has no enum Prop entries. Actual sources were css_values.go and yj_to_epub_resources.go. Transcript shows worker discovered this at grep step and adapted correctly.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The worker correctly noted that for same-package refactoring in Go (all files in internal/kfx/), no import changes are needed when moving functions between files. This is implicit Go knowledge but relevant for future refactoring features.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Transcript shows worker checked all callers with grep and confirmed all references are within the same package before proceeding with the move.

summary: Clean, correct pure refactoring. All 11 enum property mapper functions were moved from css_values.go and yj_to_epub_resources.go to yj_property_info.go with zero functional change. The moved code is placed in a well-organized section with a descriptive header comment, right after the borderStyles variable and before yjPropertyNames init. No enum mappers remain in the source files. All callers (in css_values.go, yj_to_epub_resources.go, and storyline.go) continue to work because all files share the same package. Build, vet, and all 430 synthetic tests pass. The doc.go checklist was correctly updated. No issues found.
